title: Model Architecture List
description: JSON record carrying a set of `config.json` `model_type` values used to filter cached models by architecture.
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries the set of architecture identifiers a cap supports (its `supported_model_types`). Used by `list-compatible-models` and similar caps to drive cap-aware model pickers — the user is presented only with models whose detected architecture is in this set.

## When to use
Pass this record from a cap's `supported_model_types` declaration to `cap:op=list-compatible-models` to retrieve the cached models the cap can run. The same shape is reused by the `architectures` field of `media:model-search-request`.

## Notes
Architecture identifiers are HuggingFace `config.json` `model_type` values (e.g. `mistral`, `llama`, `qwen2`, `phi3`, `gemma2`). They are NOT pipeline tags — `text-generation` is a pipeline tag, not an architecture.

architectures.description: Architecture identifiers the calling cap supports.
